commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 11. "But I have walked in mine innocence: deliver me, and have mercy on me" (ver. 11). Let so great a price of my Lord's Blood avail formy complete deliverance: and in the dangers of this life let not Thy mercy leave me.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Innocence. He opposes the integrity of his proceedings to that of the wicked. (Calmet)
Yet still calls for mercy. (Haydock)
Every one should strive to be innocent, and to avoid the company of world lings. (Worthington)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
